id.pageDescription: Portfolio profesional Fajar Cahyadiputra, Backend Developer dengan pengalaman 5 tahun dalam membangun API, distributed systems, database, messaging, dan cloud-native deployment.
id.heroTitle: Membangun produk digital yang cepat, jelas, dan andal.
id.heroBio: Halo, saya Fajar Cahyadiputra, seorang Backend Developer dengan pengalaman 5 tahun dalam membangun API, layanan terdistribusi, dan sistem backend yang scalable, reliable, serta mudah dipelihara.
id.aboutTitle: Backend developer yang membangun sistem andal dan scalable.
id.aboutIntro: Selama 5 tahun, saya berfokus pada pengembangan backend—mulai dari perancangan arsitektur, pembuatan REST API, pengelolaan database, integrasi message broker, hingga deployment menggunakan container orchestration.
id.aboutDetail: Saya terbiasa menerjemahkan proses bisnis menjadi service yang maintainable, aman, dan terukur. Pengalaman saya mencakup pengembangan monolith maupun microservices, optimasi database, asynchronous processing, observability, serta deployment aplikasi ke environment produksi.
id.skillsTitle: Teknologi yang saya gunakan untuk membangun backend.
id.skillsIntro: Tech stack disusun berdasarkan area penggunaan agar kemampuan backend, data, messaging, arsitektur, dan deployment lebih mudah dipahami.
id.coreBackendDesc: Teknologi utama untuk membangun service, API, worker, dan proses backend.
id.nodeFrameworkDesc: Framework untuk API modular, enterprise service, dan aplikasi berbasis event.
id.goFrameworkDesc: Framework ringan dan cepat untuk REST API, microservices, dan layanan dengan throughput tinggi.
id.phpFrameworkDesc: Framework produktif untuk aplikasi bisnis, API, dan sistem internal.
id.databaseDesc: Database relasional, database dokumen, caching, session, dan akses data berkecepatan tinggi.
id.messagingDesc: Komunikasi asynchronous, event streaming, pemrosesan queue, dan pemisahan antar-service.
id.architectureDesc: Pendekatan arsitektur yang disesuaikan dengan ukuran produk, kompleksitas domain, dan kebutuhan scaling.
id.infrastructureDesc: Menjalankan dan mengelola aplikasi backend pada server Linux maupun Windows dengan containerized deployment.
id.projectsTitle: Proyek yang menunjukkan cara saya bekerja.
id.projectOrderDesc: Dashboard operasional untuk memonitor order, revenue, status pembayaran, dan export laporan secara cepat.
id.projectClipDesc: Workflow otomatis untuk mengubah video panjang menjadi potongan konten singkat yang siap dipublikasikan.
id.projectBookingDesc: Sistem booking berbasis REST API dengan manajemen jadwal, notifikasi, dan kontrol status layanan.
id.experienceTitle: Pengalaman membangun solusi yang siap digunakan.
id.experienceIntro: Timeline ini menggunakan data dummy dan dapat langsung disesuaikan dengan pengalaman kerja asli.
id.expBullet1: Membangun REST API dan layanan backend yang scalable menggunakan Go, Node.js, PHP, PostgreSQL, dan Redis.
id.expBullet2: Mengintegrasikan layanan pihak ketiga, message broker, asynchronous jobs, dan workflow berbasis event.
id.expBullet3: Mendesain service, database schema, autentikasi, dan proses asynchronous.
id.expBullet4: Meningkatkan performa query dan menjaga konsistensi kualitas kode melalui Git workflow.
id.expBullet5: Membuat website company profile, landing page, dan sistem internal sesuai kebutuhan klien.
id.expBullet6: Mengelola komunikasi, estimasi pekerjaan, delivery, dan dukungan setelah rilis.
id.contactTitle: Punya ide? Mari kita bangun bersama.
id.contactIntro: Tuliskan kebutuhan proyek Anda. Tombol kirim akan membuka Gmail atau aplikasi email default dengan alamat tujuan dan isi pesan yang sudah terisi otomatis.
id.messagePlaceholder: Ceritakan tentang proyek, tujuan, atau kebutuhan Anda...
id.emailFormNote: Tombol ini akan membuka Gmail atau aplikasi email default Anda dengan pesan yang sudah terisi.
id.demoMissing: URL demo belum diatur. Ganti tombol ini dengan tautan proyek Anda.
id.copyright: © Fajar Cahyadiputra. Seluruh hak cipta dilindungi.
id.emailSubject: Diskusi Proyek dari Portfolio Fajar Cahyadiputra
id.emailBodyClosing: Saya menghubungi Anda melalui website portfolio.

en.pageDescription: Professional portfolio of Fajar Cahyadiputra, a Backend Developer with 5 years of experience building APIs, distributed systems, databases, messaging, and cloud-native deployments.
en.heroTitle: Building digital products that feel fast, clear, and reliable.
en.heroBio: Hi, I am Fajar Cahyadiputra, a Backend Developer with 5 years of experience building APIs, distributed services, and backend systems that are scalable, reliable, and maintainable.
en.aboutTitle: A backend developer building reliable, scalable systems.
en.aboutIntro: For the past 5 years, I have focused on backend development—from architecture design and REST API development to database management, message broker integration, and deployment with container orchestration.
en.aboutDetail: I translate business processes into secure, measurable, and maintainable services. My experience covers monoliths and microservices, database optimization, asynchronous processing, observability, and production deployments.
en.skillsTitle: Technologies I use to build backend systems.
en.skillsIntro: The stack is organized by area so my backend, data, messaging, architecture, and deployment capabilities are easy to understand.
en.coreBackendDesc: Core technologies for building services, APIs, workers, and backend processes.
en.nodeFrameworkDesc: Frameworks for modular APIs, enterprise services, and event-driven applications.
en.goFrameworkDesc: Fast, lightweight frameworks for REST APIs, microservices, and high-throughput services.
en.phpFrameworkDesc: Productive frameworks for business applications, APIs, and internal systems.
en.databaseDesc: Relational databases, document databases, caching, sessions, and high-speed data access.
en.messagingDesc: Asynchronous communication, event streaming, queue processing, and service decoupling.
en.architectureDesc: Architecture selected according to product size, domain complexity, and scaling requirements.
en.infrastructureDesc: Running and managing backend applications on Linux and Windows servers with containerized deployments.
en.projectsTitle: Projects that demonstrate how I work.
en.projectOrderDesc: An operational dashboard for quickly monitoring orders, revenue, payment status, and report exports.
en.projectClipDesc: An automated workflow that turns long-form videos into short, publish-ready content clips.
en.projectBookingDesc: A REST API booking system with schedule management, notifications, and service status controls.
en.experienceTitle: Experience building solutions ready for real-world use.
en.experienceIntro: This timeline uses placeholder data and can be replaced with your actual work experience.
en.expBullet1: Built scalable REST APIs and backend services using Go, Node.js, PHP, PostgreSQL, and Redis.
en.expBullet2: Integrated third-party services, message brokers, asynchronous jobs, and event-driven workflows.
en.expBullet3: Designed services, database schemas, authentication, and asynchronous processes.
en.expBullet4: Improved query performance and maintained consistent code quality through Git workflows.
en.expBullet5: Built company profile websites, landing pages, and internal systems tailored to client requirements.
en.expBullet6: Managed communication, estimates, delivery, and post-release support.
en.contactTitle: Have an idea? Let us build it together.
en.contactIntro: Describe your project needs. The send button will open Gmail or your default email app with the recipient and message filled in automatically.
en.messagePlaceholder: Tell me about your project, goals, or requirements...
en.emailFormNote: This button opens Gmail or your default email application with your message already filled in.
en.messageRequired: The message must contain at least 15 characters.
en.demoMissing: The live demo URL has not been configured. Replace this button with your project link.
en.copyright: © Fajar Cahyadiputra. All rights reserved.
en.toastReady: Your message is ready to send.

en.emailSubject: Project Discussion from Fajar Cahyadiputra Portfolio
en.emailBodyClosing: I am contacting you through your portfolio website.
